dashboard.label: SOC Incident Response Lab — IR-2026-001
dashboard.description: Security Operations Center dashboard for monitoring brute force attacks, PowerShell abuse, and internal reconnaissance. Lab exercise based on simulated Windows environment.

search.query: index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625 | stats count AS fails, max(_time) AS last_fail BY src_ip | where fails >= 5 | join type=inner src_ip [ search index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 | stats count AS success BY src_ip ] | stats count

index=windows (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4688 Image="*powershell*") OR (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" EventCode=4104) | eval cmdline=coalesce(CommandLine, ScriptBlockText) | where match(lower(cmdline), "invoke-webrequest|downloadstring|encodedcommand|-enc\s") | stats count
index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4688 | eval cmdline=lower(CommandLine) | where match(cmdline, "whoami|net user|ipconfig|systeminfo|tasklist|netstat") | stats count

chart.title: DET-001 | Failed Logon Attempts Over Time (EventCode 4625)

search.query: index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625 | timechart span=5m count AS "Failed Logons" BY src_ip

table.title: DET-002 | Brute Force Success — Top Attackers

search.query: index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625 | stats count AS failed_attempts BY src_ip | where failed_attempts >= 10 | sort -failed_attempts | head 10

index=windows (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4688 Image="*powershell*") OR (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational" EventCode=4104) | eval cmdline=coalesce(CommandLine, ScriptBlockText) | where match(lower(cmdline), "invoke-webrequest|downloadstring|downloadfile|webclient|iex.*http") | eval time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table time, host, user, cmdline | sort -time

index=windows (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4688) OR (sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=1) | eval cmdline=coalesce(CommandLine, process) | where match(lower(cmdline), "powershell") AND match(lower(cmdline), "-enc") | eval time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table time, host, user, cmdline | sort -time

index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4688 | eval cmdline=lower(CommandLine) | eval recon_type=case( match(cmdline,"net\s+user|net\s+group"), "Account Discovery", match(cmdline,"whoami"), "User Context", match(cmdline,"ipconfig|netstat|arp"), "Network Discovery", match(cmdline,"systeminfo|hostname"), "System Info", match(cmdline,"tasklist|wmic"), "Process Discovery", true(), null() ) | where isnotnull(recon_type) | stats count BY recon_type

index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4688 | eval cmdline=lower(CommandLine) | where match(cmdline, "whoami|net user|net group|ipconfig|systeminfo|tasklist|netstat") | eval time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table time, host, user, CommandLine | sort -time

chart.title: Full Attack Timeline — All Detection Events

search.query: index=windows sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" (EventCode=4625 OR EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4688) | eval event_type=case( EventCode=4625, "Failed Logon", EventCode=4624, "Successful Logon", EventCode=4688, "Process Created" ) | timechart span=1m count BY event_type
